en: Please upload the copy of the Permanent Account Number (PAN) Card.
Please upload the copy of the Service Tax Registration.
Please upload the copy of the Employee Provident Fund (EPF) Card.
Please upload the Labor Compliance documents.
Does your company provide security services (security system maintenance & manguarding)?
Please upload the copy of the PSARA Certificate for Security.
Is your company classified as a micro, small, or medium enterprise?
Please upload the copy of the MSME Certificate.
